title: Limited Tech
description: Progress through mods including create with very limited starting resources.
body:
# Limited Tech
### Survive with a few saplings, some ice and a bucket of lava
Get cobblestone to find the hidden treasures within. 
Use stone to grind down the cobblestone into gravel.
Search through the gravel with a shovel to find iron.
Then use the create mod to automate everything, from wood too diamonds
##
### Recipies
###
there is low mod tampering, so you don't need to relearn a mods recipies. 
New recipie type, refining, is done in a crafting table; using one item to turn others into a different item.
##
### how to get started
###
1. push create new world
2. set world type to superflat
3. turn off generated structures
4. enjoy
